debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
A : Set α
hA : A ∈ ↑𝓒
B : Set α
hB : B ∈ ↑𝓒
hAB :
  Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff A (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)) = Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff B (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B))
this : symmDiff (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
⊢ A = B

proof:
simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)).subset.trans <|
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC)).trans this.symm.subset
  rw [h hA, h hB] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_left_inj.1 hAB
failed_attempts:
simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right] at hAB
  · exact Set.symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB
  · exact (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)).trans_subset
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB))
  · exact (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA)).trans_subset
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA))

rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val,
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left ((symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA)).symm.subset.trans
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA))),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left ((symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)).symm.subset.trans
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB)))] at hAB
  exact (symmDiff_left_inj _).1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simpa [Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA, Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB,
    Set.biInter_subset_biUnion ⟨A, hA⟩, Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA,
    Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB, symmDiff_of_ge] using hAB

rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ⊆ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := by
    rw [this, symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)]
    exact Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC)
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (h hA), Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (h hB)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_left_inj.1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  exact Set.sdiff_left_inj.1 (by simpa [hA, hB, Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem, Set.biInter_subset_of_mem] using hAB)
    (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA) (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)

exact symmDiff_left_inj.1 <| by
    simpa [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this, symmDiff_of_ge,
      Set.biInter_subset_of_mem, Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset,
      Set.diff_subset_diff_left] using hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simp_all [Set.biInter_subset_of_mem, Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem, ← symmDiff_of_ge, symmDiff_left_inj]

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset <| (Set.symmDiff_of_ge <| Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC).trans_le <|
      Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC) Set.Subset.rfl
  exact (Set.symmDiff_right_inj _).1 <| (h hA).symm.trans <| hAB.trans <| h hB

rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset <| (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)).symm ▸
      Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC)
  rw [h hA, h hB] at hAB
  exact (symmDiff_left_inj _).1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| (symmDiff_of_ge <| biInter_subset_of_mem hC).subset.trans <|
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left <| subset_biUnion_of_mem hC).trans this.symm.subset
  exact (symmDiff_left_inj _).1 <| (h hA).symm.trans <| hAB.trans (h hB)

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right] at hAB
  · exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB
  all_goals
    rw [this, symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem ‹_›)]
    exact Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem ‹_›) subset_rfl

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val,
    symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA), symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA)),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB))] at hAB
  rw [← Set.diff_union_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA), hAB,
    Set.diff_union_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)]

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ⊆ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC) ▸ Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC)
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset (h hA), Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset (h hB)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simp [hA, hB, Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem, Set.biInter_subset_biUnion ⟨A, hA⟩,
    ← symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA), ← symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  exact Set.diff_left_inj.1 hAB (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA) (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left, symmDiff_right_inj] at hAB
  · exact hAB
  all_goals
    rw [← symmDiff_of_le (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem _)]
    exact Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem _) subset_rfl

have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)) = C \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := by
    rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC),
      Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC) Subset.rfl)]
  rw [← Set.diff_union_self_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA), h hA, hAB, ← h hB,
    Set.diff_union_self_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)]

rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h {D} (hD : D ∈ 𝓒) : (D ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = D ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hD) ▸
      Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hD) subset_rfl
  exact symmDiff_left_injective _ ((h hA).symm.trans (hAB.trans (h hB)))

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_left_injective _ (by simpa [symmDiff_of_ge, Set.biInter_subset_of_mem, hA, hB] using hAB)

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simpa [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left, Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem, hA, hB,
    ← Set.diff_union_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA),
    ← Set.diff_union_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)] using hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left] at hAB
  · exact symmDiff_left_injective hAB
  · exact (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)).le.trans
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB))
  · exact (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA)).le.trans
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA))

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)).subset.trans
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC))
  rw [h hA, h hB] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simpa [symmDiff_of_ge, Set.biInter_subset_of_mem, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right,
    Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem, Set.symmDiff_left_inj] using hAB

have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B ⊆ (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B := by
    rw [symmDiff_comm, symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)]
    exact Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC)
  rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_of_subset (h hA), Set.image_preimage_eq_of_subset (h hB)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_injective hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simp [hA, hB, Set.biInter_subset_biUnion ⟨A, hA⟩] at hAB
  rw [← Set.diff_union_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA),
    ← Set.diff_union_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB), hAB]

have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)).le.trans <|
      Set.diff_subset_diff_left <| Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC
  simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, h hA, h hB] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right (by rw [symmDiff_of_ge (biInter_subset_of_mem hA)]; exact Set.diff_subset_diff (subset_biUnion_of_mem hA) subset_rfl),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right (by rw [symmDiff_of_ge (biInter_subset_of_mem hB)]; exact Set.diff_subset_diff (subset_biUnion_of_mem hB) subset_rfl)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB

rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| (symmDiff_of_ge $ Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC).subset.trans $
      Set.diff_subset_diff_left $ Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC
  exact (symmDiff_left_inj _).1 <| (h hA).symm.trans <| hAB.trans (h hB)

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' (C ∆ ⋂ D ∈ 𝓒, D)) = C \ ⋂ D ∈ 𝓒, D := by
    rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, Set.symmDiff_eq_sdiff_of_le (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC),
      Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (Set.sdiff_subset_sdiff (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC) Set.subset_rfl)]
  exact Set.sdiff_left_inj (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA) (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB) (by rw [← h hA, ← h hB, hAB])

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  exact Set.sdiff_left_inj (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA) (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB) hAB

simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this,
    ← Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm _ (⋃ _, _)] at hAB
  simp_rw [Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)] at hAB
  exact (symmDiff_left_inj _).1 hAB
successful_attempts:
simp_rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val, ← this] at hAB
  have h {C} (hC : C ∈ 𝓒) : (C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) ∩ ((⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = C ∆ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B :=
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left <| (symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hC)).subset.trans <|
      (Set.diff_subset_diff_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hC)).trans this.symm.subset
  rw [h hA, h hB] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_left_inj.1 hAB
